project.project_name: Seahorse Offshore Wind Farm GP Survey

comments.comment_text: Document is oriented internally to Geoview internal process. However, for major changes, Client shall be informed and shall approve the modifications. Dedicated section to be added and associated template for the MOC to be revised to take this point into account.
